title: Molten Chestnut Sisig-Stirfry
description: A savory and umami-rich meal-prep Filipino dish featuring chestnuts, stir-fried with sizzling hot sisig (a popular pork dish) to create a unique texture and flavor profile suitable for shojin-ryori cuisine.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or frying pan.
Add chopped scallions and sauté for about 30 seconds.
Gradually add diced sisig meat, stir-frying until it's slightly browned.
Fold in chestnuts and continue to fry gently for another minute.
Mix tamarind paste with fish sauce to make a paste.
Add the tamarind fish sauce mixture and red chili pepper.
Cook until the mixture thickens slightly, about 3-5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with lime juice to taste.
